Title: Register a new user with valid data
Test Data:
- username: john_doe
- password: securepassword
- name: John Doe
- email: johndoe@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid username, password, name, and email.
2. User clicks on the "Register" button.
3. Main component verifies the data.
4. Users Database saves the user data.
Expected Result: User receives a success message indicating registration was successful.

Title: Register a new user with invalid data
Test Data:
- username: john_doe
- password: short
- name: John Doe
- email: johndoe@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User enters an invalid password (less than 8 characters).
2. User clicks on the "Register" button.
3. Main component verifies the data.
4. Users Database does not save the user data.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating registration failed due to invalid data.

Title: Login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid email and password.
2. User clicks on the "Login" button.
3. Main component sends the credentials to the Users Database.
4. Users Database verifies the credentials.
5. Users Database returns a success message.
Expected Result: User receives a success message indicating login was successful.

Title: Login with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User enters an incorrect password.
2. User clicks on the "Login" button.
3. Main component sends the credentials to the Users Database.
4. Users Database verifies the credentials.
5. Users Database returns an error message.
Expected Result: User receives an error message indicating login failed due to invalid credentials.

Title: Create a new trip with valid data
Test Data:
- city: New York
- country: USA
- beginDate: 2023-10-01
- endDate: 2023-10-07
- author: John Doe
Test Steps:
1. User logs in.
2. User navigates to the trip creation page.
3. User enters valid trip details.
4. User clicks on the "Create Trip" button.
5. Main component creates the trip.
6. Main component associates the trip with a plan.
7. Main component saves the trip data to the Trips Database.
Expected Result: User receives a success message indicating the trip was created successfully.

Title: Create a new trip with invalid data
Test Data:
- city:

- author: John Doe
